name: Daily Threat : The Storm
short_description: A deadly storm struck Happy Town, leaving young He Chang alone at home to fend off the threats creeping in with the tempest.
detailed_description:
Story Mode

It is said that the Storm is the most dangerous natural disaster, yet it can be detected in advance. All residents in affected areas should evacuate promptly.

You play as He Chang, a car mechanic who quit his job and now lives at home. He happens to reside in Happy Town, which is about to be struck by the Storm. However, He Chang dismisses the threat of the Storm

Refusing to evacuate, he will fight bare-handed against the unwelcome guests arriving with the Storm. But can he really pull it off...?

Endless Mode

At an unknown time, He Chang heads to the supermarket to buy daily necessities. But just his luck,

he encounters a gang attack. Another resident coincidentally trapped in the supermarket will join him in fighting off these criminals.

Game Features

  • Simple controls execute all combat actions

  • Your enemies appear to operate in organized patterns—understanding their attack rhythms increases your survival chances

  • When enemies are struck or allies fall, they may lash out in rage or blame you in sorrow

  • To achieve higher scores in Endless Mode, prioritize protecting your companions

  • Ambient atmosphere shifts dynamically as you progress through the game

supported_languages:
Simplified Chinese*, English, Japanese, Traditional Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
